title: Megaoops
relevance_summary: Multisig error leading to unexpected contract execution

prevention.rule: Block any tx that modifies multisig contract parameters without proper approval

red_flags: Multisig parameter modification without proper approval
summary: A multisig error caused $500 million to be locked in the MegaETH pre-deposit contract due to incorrect parameter modification. A guard could have prevented this by blocking any tx modifying multisig contract parameters without proper approval.
